name: Spiced Vegetable Couscous
recipeIngredient: 1 Red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch chunks (1 cup)
1 can Chick peas, rinsed and drained (15 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart glass measure, stir together tomato juice, curry powder, garlic powder, coriander, salt, ginger, cumin, and red pepper. Reserve 1 cup of the mixture.
2. Pour 3/4 cup of the mixture into a 1-1/2 quart casserole; add water. Cover with lid and microwave on high for 3-5 minutes, or until boiling.
3. Stir in couscous; cover and let stand 8 minutes.
4. Add carrots and raisins to the remaining mixture in the glass measure. Cover with vented plastic wrap and microwave on high for 4-6 minutes, or until crisp tender.
5. Add broccoli and bell pepper. Microwave on high for 3-5 minutes, or until crisp tender.
6. Stir in peas; re-cover and microwave on high for 2 minutes.
7. Fluff couscous with a fork and arrange in the center of a large serving plate. Surround with vegetable mixture and serve immediately.
